series_metadata.series_description: Submittals from owners requesting revocation of a mandatory pooling order. Notice to mineral owners of a revocation order, including mailed letters, returned mail, and proof of mailing. This retention schedule does not include Chief's Orders to revoke a mandatory pooling order.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years after the Chief’s Order for mandatory pooling has been revoked. If records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be recycled at that time. ; Electronic: 2 years after the Chief’s Order for mandatory pooling has been revoked., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
